nasb.text: And having been warned by God in a dream not to return to Herod, the magi left for their own country by another way.

esv.text: And being warned in a dream not to return to Herod, they departed to their own country by another way.

cnv.text: 後來他們在夢中得著指示不要回到希律那裡去，就從別的路回鄉去了。

ccb.text: 他们在梦中得到指示不可回希律那里，便改道返回了家乡。

csbs.text: 他们在梦中得了神的指示不要回到希律那里去，就从另一条路回到自己的家乡去了。
